fields.name: tax_reminder_days_before
fields.raw: models.PositiveIntegerField(default=7, help_text='Days before tax due date to send reminder')

fields.name: rent_reminder_days_before
fields.raw: models.PositiveIntegerField(default=7, help_text='Days before rent due date to send reminder')

fields.name: FEATURE_CHOICES
fields.raw: [('max_buildings', 'Max Buildings'), ('max_units', 'Max Units'), ('max_renters', 'Max Renters per Unit'), ('max_caretakers', 'Max Caretakers per Unit'), ('max_unit_images', 'Max Unit Images'), ('max_document_uploads', 'Max Document Uploads per Unit'), ('tax_notifications', 'Tax Notifications'), ('whatsapp_alerts', 'WhatsApp Alerts'), ('rent_agreement_drafting', 'Rent Agreement Drafting'), ('export_pdf_dossier', 'Export PDF Dossier')]

fields.name: name
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=255, help_text="Building name or identifier (e.g., 'Sunshine Complex', 'Tower A')")

fields.name: address_line
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=255, help_text='Street address of the building')

fields.name: city
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=100, help_text='City where building is located', db_index=True)

fields.name: owner
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey(User, on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='buildings', help_text='Owner of this building', db_index=True)

fields.name: is_archived
fields.raw: models.BooleanField(default=False, help_text='Soft-delete: archived buildings are excluded from queries')

fields.name: created_at
fields.raw: models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True, db_index=True, help_text='When this building was added to the system')

fields.name: name
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=50, help_text='Charge name, e.g. Electricity or Maintenance')

fields.name: status
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=10, choices=Status.choices, default=Status.DUE, help_text='Current payment status for this extra charge')

fields.name: unit
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey(Unit, on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='rent_records', db_index=True, help_text='Unit this rent record belongs to')

fields.name: renter
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey('properties.Renter', on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, related_name='rent_records', help_text='Renter who made the payment')

fields.name: payment_method
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=50, choices=PaymentMethod.choices, help_text='Mode of payment used')

fields.name: paid_on
fields.raw: models.DateField(null=True, blank=True, help_text='Date when payment was made')

fields.name: late_fee
fields.raw: models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2, default=0, help_text='Late fee applied')

fields.name: discount
fields.raw: models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2, default=0, help_text='Any discount given')

fields.name: transaction_id
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, help_text='Payment gateway / bank ref')

fields.name: invoice_pdf
fields.raw: models.FileField(upload_to='invoices/', blank=True, null=True, help_text='Generated rent receipt PDF')

fields.name: payout_retries
fields.raw: models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0, help_text='Number of payout retry attempts')

fields.name: last_payout_retry
fields.raw: models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True, help_text='Timestamp of last payout retry')

fields.name: adjustment_reason
fields.raw: models.TextField(blank=True, help_text='Reason for late fee or adjustment')

fields.name: email
fields.raw: models.EmailField(default='', blank=True, help_text="Renter's email for receipts and notifications")

fields.name: rent_due_date
fields.raw: models.DateField(blank=True, null=True, default=date.today, help_text='Required for rent reminder')

fields.name: onboarding_status
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=OnboardingStatus.choices, default=OnboardingStatus.PENDING, help_text='Renter self-onboarding progress')

fields.name: kyc_status
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=KYCStatus.choices, default=KYCStatus.NOT_STARTED, help_text='KYC verification status')

fields.name: onboarding_token
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, unique=True, help_text='Secure token for onboarding link')

fields.name: onboarding_link_sent_at
fields.raw: models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True, help_text='When the onboarding link was sent to renter')

fields.name: owner
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey(User, on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='units', db_index=True, help_text='Property owner')

fields.name: building
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey('properties.Building', on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True, db_index=True, related_name='units', help_text='Parent building (optional for standalone units)')

fields.name: building_name
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, help_text='Display name of building (cached for performance)')

fields.name: landmark
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, help_text='Nearby landmark for easy identification')

fields.name: latitude
fields.raw: models.DecimalField(max_digits=9, decimal_places=6, blank=True, null=True, help_text='Latitude coordinate (-90 to 90)')

fields.name: longitude
fields.raw: models.DecimalField(max_digits=9, decimal_places=6, blank=True, null=True, help_text='Longitude coordinate (-180 to 180)')

fields.name: status
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=VacancyStatus.choices, default=VacancyStatus.VACANT, help_text='Current occupancy status')

fields.name: is_verified
fields.raw: models.BooleanField(default=False, help_text='Whether property details have been verified')

fields.name: is_archived
fields.raw: models.BooleanField(default=False, help_text='Soft-delete: archived units are hidden from listings')

fields.name: last_vacated_at
fields.raw: models.DateField(null=True, blank=True, help_text='Date when the unit became vacant because no active renter remained')

fields.name: rent_due_reminder
fields.raw: models.BooleanField(default=True, help_text='Enable automated rent due reminders')

fields.name: agreement_expiry_reminder
fields.raw: models.BooleanField(default=True, help_text='Enable automated agreement expiry reminders')

fields.name: maintenance_notes
fields.raw: models.TextField(blank=True, help_text='Internal notes about maintenance or issues')

fields.name: notes
fields.raw: models.TextField(blank=True, help_text='Additional notes about the unit')

fields.name: unit
fields.raw: models.OneToOneField(UNIT_MODEL_REF, on_delete=models.CASCADE, help_text='Unit that became vacant')

fields.name: unit
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey(UNIT_MODEL_REF, on_delete=models.CASCADE, db_index=True, related_name='documents', help_text='Unit this document belongs to')

fields.name: renter
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey('properties.Renter', on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True, db_index=True, related_name='documents', help_text='Associated renter (optional)')

fields.name: file_hash
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=64, editable=False, db_index=True, help_text='SHA256 hash for deduplication')

fields.name: unit
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey(UNIT_MODEL_REF, on_delete=models.CASCADE, db_index=True, related_name='images', help_text='Unit these images belong to')

fields.name: renter
fields.raw: models.ForeignKey('properties.Renter', on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True, db_index=True, related_name='images', help_text='Associated renter (optional - for condition check-in/out photos)')

fields.name: image_hash
fields.raw: models.CharField(max_length=64, editable=False, db_index=True, help_text='SHA256 hash for deduplication')
